steps.title: Set off the attribution
steps.content: The phrase claims dendrochronologist Valerie Trouet interrupts the main clause: a single tree like this can tell the history of the world. The punctuation after this must open that interruption.

steps.title: Compare the punctuation
steps.content: Choice A leaves the interruption unmarked; Choice C uses a colon for explanation; Choice D uses a semicolon for independent clauses. Choice B uses a comma matching the comma after Trouet. The answer is B.
